title: Livestock manure fractions schema
description: Fractions partitioning manure to grazing/land and other uses by production system and livestock type.

fields.name: iso
fields.title: Integer zone identifier
fields.description: Integer zone identifier matching the isoraster domain.

fields.name: gid
fields.title: GADM ID for country/subarea
fields.description: Administrative area identifier.

fields.name: meat_fgi
fields.title: Meat fgi
fields.description: Manure fraction to grazing/land in intensive systems.

fields.name: meat_fge
fields.title: Meat fge
fields.description: Manure fraction to grazing/land in extensive systems.

fields.name: meat_foi
fields.title: Meat foi
fields.description: Manure fraction to other uses in intensive systems.

fields.name: meat_foe
fields.title: Meat foe
fields.description: Manure fraction to other uses in extensive systems.
